summary: Complete frontend testing of CyberDeck DJ Turntable v8 with new sampler section and track info bar. All 11 requested features verified working. New sampler buttons (HORN, SIREN, DROP, AIRHORN) visible and interactive on both decks. Track info bars show 'KEY ---' and '--:--' when no station loaded. UI fits on 1920x800 without scrolling.
passed_tests: App loads without errors
Sampler section visible on Deck A with HORN, SIREN, DROP, AIRHORN buttons
Sampler section visible on Deck B with HORN, SIREN, DROP, AIRHORN buttons
Track info bar visible on Deck A showing KEY --- and --:-- when no station loaded
Track info bar visible on Deck B showing KEY --- and --:-- when no station loaded
Sampler buttons are clickable and toggle state correctly (background changes on click)
HORN button Deck A toggles from rgb(17,17,17) to rgba(255,102,0,0.25) on click
SIREN button Deck B toggles with red highlight rgba(255,0,60,0.25)
All existing features still work: turntables, visualizer, crossfader, transport, pads, FX, center mixer
No 0.00 placeholders visible
All UI fits on one screen without scrolling (1920x800) - bodyHeight=800, viewportHeight=800
STATIONS button opens station browser (Radio Crate modal)
Station browser shows genre tabs (HIP HOP, R&B, TRAP, SOUL)
Backend /api/stream endpoint works (422 when missing URL param as expected)
Backend /api/health returns healthy status
Play/Pause buttons present on both decks
CUE buttons present on both decks
SYNC buttons present on both decks
8 Hot Cue Pads (1-8) present on both decks
FX RACK visible with ECHO, REVERB, FILTER, DRY/WET knobs
Record button present in header
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console warning 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}' - accessibility improvement opportunity for station browser modal
context_for_next_testing_agent: v8 adds sampler section (4 buttons: HORN, SIREN, DROP, AIRHORN with data-testid='sampler-{1-4}-{a|b}') and track info bar (data-testid='track-info-{a|b}') below FX rack in each deck panel. Sampler buttons are visual-only (no actual audio samples). Track info shows detected key and elapsed time when playing, shows 'KEY ---' and '--:--' when idle. All previous v7 features remain intact.
